name: Loanstar Title Loans
description_short: Loanstar Title Loans Manor, Texas — LoanStar Title Loans offers quick cash loans up to $10,000 secured by vehicle titles, with multiple Fort Worth-area ...
description_long:
LoanStar Title Loans was founded in 1990 in Jonesboro, Georgia, and has operated for over 25 years as a title lending service across multiple states. The company specializes in auto title loans, allowing borrowers to leverage their vehicle's equity to access emergency cash without traditional credit checks. They operate five locations across the Fort Worth metropolitan area, including Fort Worth, Haltom City, Richland Hills, and Burleson, providing convenient access for Texas residents.

The company offers car title loans up to $10,000, requiring only a vehicle, valid photo ID, and a clear vehicle title to qualify. They accept multiple payment methods including cash, check, debit card, and Western Union transfers. LoanStar provides fee schedules and disclosure documents for various loan amounts ($600, $1,200, and $2,000), with both multiple installment and single installment options available. Their Fort Worth locations operate Monday-Friday 10 AM–6 PM and Saturday mornings, with a general customer service line at 877-511-CASH.

LoanStar distinguishes itself through its multi-location presence in the Fort Worth area, established 25-year operating history, and transparent fee disclosure practices. They clearly display OCCC (Oklahoma Consumer Credit Commission) compliance notices and provide downloadable fee schedules for consumer review before applying. The company markets itself as helping "hardworking Americans" access needed cash based on vehicle equity rather than credit history.

The primary caveat is that title loans are high-cost debt instruments with significant interest rates and fees, as evidenced by their separate fee disclosures for different loan amounts. While the company provides transparency through published fee schedules, borrowers should carefully review these documents before committing, as repayment failure could result in vehicle repossession. The lack of detailed APR information on the main website (though fee schedules exist) makes upfront cost comparison difficult.
pros: Loans up to $10,000 available, higher than typical payday loans
Multiple locations in Fort Worth area (5 nearby locations within 15 miles)
Clear vehicle title is only collateral requirement—no credit check mentioned
Accepts multiple payment methods including cash, check, debit card, and Western Union
Published fee schedules available for $600, $1,200, and $2,000 loans with multiple/single installment options
Extended operating hours including Saturday service (9 AM–3 PM depending on location)
cons: Title loans are high-cost debt with significant fees and interest rates (specific APRs not disclosed on main website)
Vehicle repossession risk if loan is not repaid, as title serves as collateral
Limited to vehicle owners with clear titles—excludes those without vehicles or with outstanding liens
Only operates in Texas and select other states—geographic limitation
No mention of flexible payment plans, hardship options, or loan forgiveness programs
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate cash emergencies who have clear title to their car
Borrowers with poor credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
People needing $2,000–$10,000 quickly without lengthy application processes
diagnosis: LoanStar Title Loans is best for vehicle owners with clear title who need $1,000–$10,000 in emergency cash quickly and have no access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that title loans carry high costs and significant default risk—failure to repay can result in immediate vehicle repossession, making this a last-resort option suitable only when other emergency funding sources are unavailable.
services: Cash loans secured by vehicle equity
In-person loan applications at physical locations
Photo ID and vehicle title verification
Cash, check, debit card, and Western Union payment acceptance
Bilingual service (Spanish available—'ES' option on website)
Customer service via toll-free phone line (877-511-CASH)
